title: Primitive Winter Lite Texture Pack
description: Primitive Winter Lite is a "lite" version of a bigger texture pack I am working on this just offer GUI/HUD changes with some GUI/HUD mods supported
body:
## ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0e12e97fe0b873fb35f1e5e0d31ca9a10993cf3.png)



- A lite version of a bigger texture pack I am working on souly for a mod-pack I have in the works called RL Primitive Winter
- This pack mainly offer a slightly edited / colored GUI and some other things like enchant glint etc.
- No mobs/blocks/items are edited in this pack so should pair fine with vanilla 
- I do plan on adding some mod support to the lite version (based around my mod-pack RLPW)  but this is a temp place holder until full version is done
- Hope you enjoy it :) I know it won't be everyone's cup of tea 
- YES IT IS BRIGHT

## - MODS SUPPORTED

- Apple Skin By squeek502 is natively supported
- EMI By EmilyPloszaj (Natively Supports Some of EMI add-ons)
- Overflowing Bars By Fuzs
- Mob Plaques By Fuzs natively supported
- Better Advancements By way2muchnoise
- Improvable Skills By Zeith
- Corpse By henkelmax
- Accessories & Curios Compat Layer for Accessories by Blodhgarm
